themes.title: Notification Delivery Improvements
themes.description: Enhancing the reliability and performance of notification delivery.

themes.title: User Engagement and Feedback
themes.description: Gathering user insights and preferences to improve notification features.

milestones.name: Fix Mobile Notification Delivery Issues
milestones.description: Address critical issues with mobile notification delivery.
milestones.success_criteria: Mobile notification delivery issues are resolved with a 95% success rate.

milestones.name: Monitor Notification Delivery Performance
milestones.description: Implement monitoring for notification delivery performance.
milestones.success_criteria: Notification delivery performance metrics are tracked and reported weekly.

milestones.name: User Feedback and Testing for Notification Features
milestones.description: Collect user feedback and conduct testing for new notification features.
milestones.success_criteria: User feedback is collected from at least 100 users with a satisfaction score of 80% or higher.

sequencing.reason: Monitoring performance is dependent on resolving delivery issues.
User feedback and testing require performance monitoring to be in place.

mvp.goal: Resolve critical mobile notification delivery issues.

v1.goal: Establish monitoring for notification delivery performance.

v2.goal: Gather user feedback and conduct testing for notification features.
